title: We Stole a Tram
writer: Luciano Vincenzoni, Mario Bonnard, Ruggero Maccari
actors: Aldo Fabrizi, Carlo Campanini, Juan de Landa
plot: Cesare Mancini is a tram driver who lives in Bologna. One day he accidentally hits a woman on a bicycle, the accident costs Cesare the relegation to a ticket seller.
